description: This is the main activity for an Android app demonstrating primary user authentication flows, including login, lock/unlock via biometrics, calling protected endpoints, and session management. It manages UI interactions, observes authentication state, and prompts for biometric authentication when needed.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main activity handling user authentication UI, state management, biometric prompts, and navigation to Home activity after successful login or unlock.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes views, ViewModel, biometric authenticator, and starts observing auth state and log updates.

methods.name: onStart
methods.description: Triggers biometric prompt to unlock session if returning from background and session is locked.

methods.name: onStop
methods.description: Marks the activity as backgrounded to control biometric prompts on return.

methods.name: onDestroy
methods.description: Cancels ongoing coroutines to prevent leaks.

methods.name: bindViews
methods.description: Binds UI components to code variables.

methods.name: wireClicks
methods.description: Sets click listeners for login, lock, unlock, protected call, logout, and clear log buttons.

methods.name: observeAuthState
methods.description: Collects authentication state updates and updates UI accordingly, including navigation on successful unlock.

methods.name: observeStatusLog
methods.description: Collects status log updates and displays them in the log TextView.

methods.name: setButtonsEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables UI buttons based on current auth state.

methods.name: maybePromptUnlock
methods.description: Prompts biometric authentication for unlocking session if appropriate, based on availability and current lock state.
